Title: A dual role for MYB60 in stomatal regulation and root growth of Arabidopsis thaliana under drought stress.
Summary: The paper investigates the role of MYB60 in Arabidopsis thaliana under drought stress, showing that it regulates stomatal movement and root growth through differential expression patterns.
